# Google Ads Agent — Buddy
# Claude Code plugin by Ahmeego (itallstartedwithaidea)
# https://github.com/itallstartedwithaidea/claude-googleadsagent

> The most comprehensive Google Ads + advertising automation plugin for Claude Code.
> Buddy enterprise agent, 2 MCP servers, 77 production skills, slash commands,
> safety hooks, anomaly monitors. Built by a practitioner with $350M+ in
> managed ad spend.

## Quickstart

- Install via Anthropic community marketplace:
  `/plugin marketplace add anthropics/claude-plugins-community`
  `/plugin install googleadsagent@claude-community`
- Self-host:
  `/plugin marketplace add itallstartedwithaidea/claude-googleadsagent`
  `/plugin install googleadsagent@claude-googleadsagent`

## Docs

- README: https://github.com/itallstartedwithaidea/claude-googleadsagent/blob/main/README.md
- Wiki: https://github.com/itallstartedwithaidea/claude-googleadsagent/wiki
- Homepage: https://www.ahmeego.com
- Hosted tools: https://www.googleadsagent.ai

## Plugin contents

- agents/ — Buddy + 6 sub-agents (Simba, Nemo, Elsa, Aladdin, Moana, Baymax)
- skills/ — 77 skills across 10 categories
- commands/ — 7 slash commands (analyze, audit, optimize, status, login, logout, switch)
- hooks/ — PreToolUse GAQL validator, PostToolUse audit logger
- monitors/ — Background Google Ads anomaly watcher
- .mcp.json — googleadsagent-mcp (PyPI) + @googleadsagent/ad-creative-mcp (npm)
